message:
chore(release): bump to v0.1.34 and increase CI build timeout to 90 minutes

The 30-minute timeout was insufficient for Windows cross-compilation
builds that include the MinGW libKernel32.a symlink workaround
introduced in the prior release. Increase to 90 minutes to provide
adequate headroom for the slowest matrix leg.

- Cargo.toml: 0.1.33 → 0.1.34
- Cargo.lock: updated version + fsqlite-func gains chrono dependency
- release.yml: build-release timeout-minutes 30 → 90

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -51,7 +51,7 @@ jobs:
   build-release:
     name: Build (${{ matrix.name }})
     runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
-    timeout-minutes: 30
+    timeout-minutes: 90
     needs: preflight
     strategy:
       fail-fast: false
